# QLFilePreviewRequest

**Class**

A Quick Look preview request that indicates the content to preview.

## Declaration

```swift
class QLFilePreviewRequest
```

## Overview

The system provides a [doc://com.apple.quicklookui/documentation/QuickLookUI/QLFilePreviewRequest] to the [doc://com.apple.quicklookui/documentation/QuickLookUI/QLPreviewingController/providePreview(for:completionHandler:)] method of your data-based Quick Look extension.

## Inspecting the preview request

- **fileURL**: The URL that indicates the content to preview.

## Data-based Preview Extensions

- **QLPreviewProvider**: A class that you subclass to provide a data-based Quick Look preview extension.
- **QLPreviewReply**: The class you create when providing a data-based Quick Look preview extension.
- **QLPreviewReplyAttachment**: An attachment for a Quick Look preview reply that provides additional content for the system to display a preview.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
